entities.description: The activity and function of root nodules in the crop

entities.description: The activity of the nitrogenase enzyme responsible for nitrogen fixation

entities.description: The quantity of nodules formed on the plant roots

entities.description: Agricultural management techniques including planting methods and nutrient application

entities.description: The method of raising seedlings in portrays and then planting them in the field

entities.name: DIBBLING
entities.description: The method of planting seeds directly into the soil

entities.description: The spatial arrangement and spacing of plants in the field

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The strategy of applying nutrients to the soil and seeds

entities.name: VERMICOMPOST
entities.description: Organic matter produced by the composting of organic materials using worms

entities.name: PSB

entities.description: Nitrogen-fixing bacteria used for seed treatment
